compiled_state.title: RED — Write structural validation tests for brainstorm web research phase
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-web-research.sh` following the pattern of `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_adversarial_review_prompts.sh`.

**Files to create/edit**: (1) `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-web-research.sh` (create), (2) `.test-index` (edit — append new test to existing brainstorm/SKILL.md entry + add RED marker)

The test validates (all section-scoped to the research phase section):
- SKILL.md contains a web research phase heading
- At least 3 named bright-line trigger conditions with one-sentence examples
- Agent-judgment trigger guidance paragraph
- WebSearch/WebFetch references within the research phase section
- Research Findings section structure with item-level format (trigger condition name, query summary, source URLs, key insight)
- Graceful degradation when WebSearch/WebFetch fails

**TDD Requirement**: This IS the RED test. Fails because no research phase exists in brainstorm SKILL.md yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-web-research.sh
- [ ] Test passes bash -n syntax check
  Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-brainstorm-web-research.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED)
  Verify: ! bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-web-research.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry updated for brainstorm SKILL.md with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'brainstorm/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-brainstorm-web-research'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-web-research.sh (created), .test-index (modified). Tests: 12 RED assertions as expected.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED structural validation tests for brainstorm web research phase
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
